name: Панель проекта
editing_rule: read-only summary, no engineering master copy

name: Редактор циклического сценария
layout_rule: unfolded cyclic scenario, no geometric ring

name: Набор испытаний
main_inputs: ring exports refs + local test overrides
editing_rule: consumer only, no scenario geometry ownership

name: Оптимизация
main_inputs: active baseline + suite snapshot + objective contract
editing_rule: one active mode at a time

name: Анализ результатов
editing_rule: historical context, no live runtime truth

name: Диагностика
main_outputs: final send bundle + health report + latest pointers

name: Параметры / Настройки
editing_rule: service surfaces do not replace core workflow

name: Инструменты
editing_rule: service surfaces remain available via search
